message:
chore(release): bump to 0.4.1 + co-rebase storage helper refactor

0.4.1 ships the cass#202 self-heal: orphan FK rows left behind by an
indexer transaction dropped mid-flight (the upstream `drop_close`
warning) are now detected and cleaned at the top of `run_index`, before
any new write would trip `FOREIGN KEY constraint failed` on the next
session close. Without this, the pending backlog grew without bound
under swarm workloads (22 GB RAM / 400% CPU per close until manual
cleanup).

Also rolls in concurrent edits by other agents to the storage helper
functions in `src/storage/sqlite.rs` (treating them as own per the
multi-agent AGENTS.md rule). Verified: test suite green,
`cleanup_orphan_fk_rows` regression test still passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "coding-agent-search"
-version = "0.4.0"
+version = "0.4.1"
 edition = "2024"
 authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
 description = "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
